description: Style NoteHawaiian thong style meets the gladiator sandals in this stylish catwalk pair. A summer essential, grab one before stocks run outProduct DetailsThong style upper with fabric straps holding the ankle (with a zipper at the spine)Printed and padded footbedTPU outsole with a floral lug at the heel and branded grooves on the fore foot regionMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
